caption: Soldier figures at close zoom now carry per-part shading -- lit heads and spearheads, darker legs, kit contrast on shields and bows -- and a soft contact shadow under every man and mount, all baked as vertex colour so each unit's team tint still multiplies through unchanged. A spearmen regiment marches a short leg while cavalry stand alongside as the mounted comparison. Render-only: the state transcript and every sim value are untouched.
